message:
Fix expand backward numel to allow zero-sized tensors instead of clamping to 1

Remove erroneous .max(1) from orig_numel and out_numel calculations in the
TensorTape backward pass for expand/broadcast gradient reduction. The clamp
masked the case where a dimension product is genuinely 0 (zero-sized tensor),
causing incorrect gradient computation. The true element count should propagate
so that zero-sized tensors are handled correctly rather than being silently
treated as having one element.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
